question: Can I modify or cancel my Bajaj Pay fastag purchase?
answer: Unfortunately, you cannot modify or cancel your Bajaj Pay fastag purchase order once you've authenticated the payment.

question: What does Tag status as 'Blacklisted'/'Low Balance'/'Hot listed' mean for my Bajaj Pay fastag?
answer: If your Bajaj Pay fastag status is shown as 'Blacklisted/Low Balance/Hot listed', you will not be able to use the fastag to pay tolls at fastag-enabled toll plazas. If you are facing any such issue, we request you to raise a request with us. CTA Label: Raise a Request, Android CTA link: bajajsuperapp://helpsupport/raisedrequest, IOS CTA link: bajajsuperapp://helpsupport/raisedrequest, Web CTA link: https://bajajfinserv.in/myaccountlogin?Source=RAR

question: I want to report a fraud.
answer: We take all fraud reporting very seriously and ensure prompt handling for all such cases. Request you to reset and change all your PINs and Passwords immediately. No executive from Bajaj Pay will ever ask for OTP or any PIN/Passwords. Request you to ensure that you do not disclose any such sensitive information to anyone. Please access the Passbook section in the App or Website and select the Transaction and click on Report a fraud in the Help & Support section.

question: I want to apply for new Fastag.
answer: 1. Click on the mentioned link 2. Accurately enter your vehicle registration number, vehicle details, and delivery address. In case you don't have a Bajaj Pay Wallet, you need to create one before purchasing Bajaj Pay fastag. 3. Enter the make and model of your vehicle. If your vehicle details are not fetched automatically, you might need to upload a copy of the physical Registration Certificate (RC) of your vehicle for validation. 4. Accept the Bajaj Pay “Terms of Use “and click on “Buy Now”. 5. Choose your payment method to complete the transaction. 6. After your order is placed successfully, your fastag will be delivered to you in 7 days on the registered address. 7. You can track the delivery of your fastag purchase on the success screen. If you have any issues with your fastag purchase or delivery, you can contact our customer support on the toll-free number. CTA Label: Manage FASTag, CTA Link: bajajsuperapp://bflfastag/Home

question: What is fastag annual pass?
answer: The FASTag Annual Pass activated on the FASTag allows free passage of private car/jeep/van at designated National Highway (NH) and National Expressway (NE) fee plazas for one year or 200 trips (whichever is earlier), without per-trip user fee charges. The Annual Pass will be effective from 15th August 2025.

question: Where can I purchase the Annual Pass?
answer: You can purchase and activate the Annual Pass only through the Rajmargyatra mobile app or the official NHAI website.

question: How will the annual pass be activated?
answer: The Annual Pass will be activated after verifying the eligibility of vehicle and associated FASTag. Upon successful verification, the user must make a payment of ₹3,000 for the respective year through Rajmargyatra mobile application or NHAI website. Once payment is confirmed, the Annual Pass will be activated to registered FASTag within 72 hours.

question: If I already have a FASTag, do I need to buy a new one for the Annual Pass?
answer: No. You do not need to purchase a new FASTag. The Annual Pass can be activated on your existing FASTag provided it meets eligibility criteria i.e., it is an eligible private car/jeep/van with valid registration number, not blacklisted or blocked vehicle number etc.

question: Which Fee Plazas are covered under the Annual Pass?
answer: It is valid only at National Highway (NH) and National Expressway (NE) fee plazas, at fee plazas on Expressways, State Highways (SH), etc., managed by state governments or private entities are not covered under this pass unless specifically notified by NHAI and applicable user charges may apply.

question: How long is the annual pass valid?
answer: The annual pass is valid for one year from date of activation or up to maximum limit of trips(200 trips), whichever comes first.

question: Can I use the Annual Pass on any vehicle?
answer: No. The Annual Pass is applicable only for the registered private car/jeep/van after checking through VAHAN database. Use in any other vehicle type will be considered invalid and may attract penalties.

question: Can I transfer the Annual Pass to another vehicle?
answer: No, the pass is non-transferable and can be used only with the registered vehicle and its FASTag affixed to its windshield. Using it on another vehicle will be considered invalid and may attract penalties.

question: How quickly will the Annual Pass be activated after payment?
answer: Yes, The Annual Pass will be activated on FASTag affixed on your car’s windshield of the registered vehicle upon successful verification of documents by Rajmargyatra mobile application or NHAI website within 2 hours of payment confirmation.

question: What if I change my car after purchasing the Annual Pass?
answer: No, The Annual Pass issued on FASTag is registered against a specific Vehicle ID (VID) which cannot be transferred to another Vehicle ID (VID). In case you change your car then new annual pass needs to be purchased for new VID.

question: How is a trip counted under the Annual Pass?
answer: For point-based fee plazas: Each section between two toll plazas counts as one trip.For closed loop fee plazas: Each entry-exit combination at toll plaza counts as one trip.

question: Will I receive notifications about my Annual Pass?
answer: Yes, By activating this feature you can allow Rajmargyatra to send SMS notifications related to your registered mobile number about renewal reminders & status updates regarding annual pass activation/deactivation etc.

question: What happens if I exceed the 200 trip limit before one year?
answer: Once the 200 trip limit is reached, the Annual Pass will expire even if the one-year period is not over. Regular toll charges will apply thereafter.

question: Can I renew the Annual Pass after expiry?
answer: Yes, you can renew the Annual Pass through the Rajmargyatra mobile application or NHAI website after expiry.

question: What is the Outstanding Amount shown in my Bajaj Pay Wallet and why is it there?
answer: The outstanding amount in your wallet refers to any unpaid or pending balance that you owe. It could be due to toll transactions you made but have not yet cleared or been deducted from your wallet balance because of insufficient funds. In either case, you need to make sure to add sufficient balance to your wallet to clear the outstanding amount.

question: What is the delivery and activation process for Bajaj Pay fastag?
answer:
1. Your fastag will be activated only after the validation of your vehicle's RC.

2. After activation, an applicable security deposit amount of 200/- will be blocked.

3. Once activated, your fastag will be delivered to the registered address within 7 days.

question: What is the fastag security deposit?
answer: The amount of Rs. 200/- is taken as a security deposit for fastag which is fully refundable with no dues at the closure of the Bajaj Pay fastag Account. The security deposit amount is implicit in the cost paid by the customer at the time of purchasing the Bajaj Pay fastag. In case of insufficient funds in the fastag account, the security deposit might be used by BFL to adjust any outstanding toll charges.

question: Why is my fastag registration transaction pending?
answer: In rare cases, the fastag registration transaction may be marked as pending due to payment processing or technical issues. It is recommended that you wait for 48 hours from the time of payment to receive the final status.

question: How do I cancel my pending payment ?

question: How to raise Queries related to cashback/voucher etc?
answer:
'Rewards In Process' refers to the rewards that are initially locked and get unlocked only after you complete the 'Offer Activity' successfully.

For example, 'Rewards in Process' cashback for wallet creation gets unlocked only after you make your first wallet load*

*Minimum wallet load amount applicable.

question: Why am I charged security deposit?
answer: The security deposit is an amount that is fully refundable with no dues at the closure of the Bajaj Pay Fastag Account. The security deposit amount is implicit in the cost paid by the you at the time of purchasing the Bajaj Pay FASTag. In case of insufficient funds in the FASTag account, the security deposit might be used by BFL to adjust any outstanding toll charges.

question: I want FASTag customer care number.
answer: You can reach out to us on our fastag Toll free number - 18002100260 and we will assist you.

question: What is the FASTag Wallet?
answer: The FASTag Wallet is a dedicated wallet created exclusively for toll payments via FASTag. It operates separately from your main wallet, with funds usable only for FASTag toll deductions.

question: Why are you moving to a separate FASTag Wallet?
answer: This is being done as per NPCI and IHMCL compliance to enhance FASTag security and ensure better segregation of toll funds.

question: Will my existing FASTag balance be migrated automatically?
answer: Yes. During migration, your current FASTag balance (up to ₹5,000) will be transferred securely into the new FASTag Wallet.

question: Do I have to create the FASTag Wallet manually?
answer: No. The FASTag Wallet will be created automatically for you during migration. You’ll only need to access it post-migration via your existing credentials.

question: Will I need a new username / password?
answer: No. You will use your existing login credentials. The FASTag Wallet is integrated under the same account, just as a separate balance.

question: Can I still use the main wallet for other payments?
answer: Yes. Your main wallet continues to function for all payments except FASTag tolls, which will draw from the FASTag Wallet.

question: How can I check my FASTag Wallet balance?
answer: Within the wallet app or portal, go to the FASTag section — the FASTag Wallet balance will be clearly shown.

question: Will I receive notifications for FASTag transactions?
answer: Yes. Each toll deduction or related transaction will generate real-time alerts (SMS/Notification) from the FASTag Wallet.

question: Is the FASTag Wallet secure?
answer: Absolutely. The FASTag Wallet follows the same stringent security and compliance as your main wallet, ensuring fund safety.

question: Can I use FASTag Wallet funds for other than toll payments?
answer: No. Funds in the FASTag Wallet can only be used for toll payments. They cannot be used for bill payments, recharges, shopping, etc.

question: Can I transfer funds from FASTag Wallet back to main wallet?
answer: No. Once funds are moved into the FASTag Wallet, they cannot be moved back out. Please transfer only the amount you expect to use for tolls.

question: Will toll charges be deducted automatically from the FASTag Wallet?
answer: Yes. When you pass through a FASTag toll plaza, the applicable toll will be automatically debited from your FASTag Wallet balance.

question: What happens if my FASTag Wallet has insufficient balance?
answer: If your balance is insufficient, the toll deduction will fail, and access may be denied. You’ll need to top up the FASTag Wallet (from main wallet or other allowed funding) before retrying.

question: How do I recharge / top up my FASTag Wallet?
answer: You can top up using the same methods you currently use (UPI, netbanking, credit/debit cards, wallet funds, etc.).

question: Are there limits on top-up (min / max) for FASTag Wallet?
answer: Yes. Minimum top-up amount is ₹100. For minimum KYC, the top-up limit is ₹10,000, and for full KYC, the top-up limit is ₹2,00,000.

question: Can I withdraw or refund unused funds in FASTag Wallet?
answer: No. Unused funds in the FASTag Wallet cannot be withdrawn. They can only be used for toll payments.

question: Why my FASTag is hotlisted
answer: Let us get this checked for you, we request you to raise a request with us. CTA Label: Raise a Request, Android CTA link: bajajsuperapp://helpsupport/raisedrequest, IOS CTA link: bajajsuperapp://helpsupport/raisedrequest, Web CTA link: https://bajajfinserv.in/myaccountlogin?Source=RAR

question: I want FASTag customer care number.
answer: You can reach out to us on our fastag Toll free number - 18002100260 and we will assist you.

question: Can full-KYC users transfer balance to bank?
answer: Before migration, full-KYC users may transfer funds from the main wallet to their bank (subject to applicable fees). FASTag Wallet funds cannot be withdrawn.

question: Post migration, can funds move from FASTag Wallet to main wallet?
answer: No. Once migration is complete, FASTag Wallet funds cannot be transferred back to the main wallet.

question: Can I move FASTag Wallet funds to other users’ FASTags?
answer: No. FASTag Wallet funds are strictly non-transferable to other users or accounts.

question: Are there any additional charges for FASTag Wallet use?
answer: No. Toll deductions will follow the same fee structure as existing FASTag usage. There are no extra charges for FASTag Wallet operations.

question: What happens when I close my FASTag?
answer: On closure, the remaining balance from the FASTag Wallet (if any) will be handled as per the standard closure policy (refunds, etc.).

question: If I sell my vehicle, what happens to my FASTag Wallet balance?
answer: In such cases, you should close your FASTag as per policy. Any usable balance will be handled according to closure/refund rules.

question: If I update my vehicle / KYC details, will that impact the FASTag Wallet?
answer: No. Your FASTag Wallet remains unaffected by KYC or RC updates. However, pending KYC issues may affect tag activation.

question: Whom do I contact for FASTag Wallet related queries?
answer: For any queries about your FASTag Wallet, contact customer support by raising a Service Request.

question: What if I do not want my balance auto-migrated?
answer: If you prefer not to migrate funds, please spend or transfer excess funds before migration begins. For queries, reach out to customer service.

question: What is the FASTag Wallet limit for my FASTag account?
answer: The FASTag Wallet limit is determined by your KYC status, in line with the wallet limit policy.

question: What happens when I recharge my FASTag through any third party app?
answer: If you recharge FASTag through any third-party app or platform (e.g., Paytm, PhonePe, GPay, etc.), the amount will be credited directly to the FASTag Wallet.

question: Can I link multiple FASTags to the same sub-wallet?
answer: Yes. Multiple FASTags (for different vehicles) can be managed through a single sub-wallet, simplifying account management.
